memory.warning: The following settings are preset to recommended values. Unless you fully understand their implications, we recommend keeping the current settings.

memory.ragLimitHelp: Number of messages retrieved during a search.
memory.deepRetrieveSummaryLimitHelp: Number of messages fetched when retrieving compressed message content.
